name: Empire of Tyrica
startIntroPart1: We are Tyrica, heir to empire and master of the civilized world
startIntroPart2: Kneel before order, and you may yet prosper beneath our banners.
declaringWar: Your resistance has exhausted our patience. Tyrica marches
attacked: You mistake our restraint for weakness. A fatal error.
defeated: Empires die slowly… and Tyrica shall haunt history long after you fade
introduction: Another realm rises before Tyrica. State your worth
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Enough blood has been spent. Let reason prevail where swords failed.
tradeRequest: Open your markets to Tyrica, and both our coffers shall swell
denounced: Dogs bark loudest before the legion arrives
declaringfriendship: Open your markets to Tyrica, and both our coffers shall swell
